description: Pinned SIX ISO 4217 List One and Unicode CLDR supplemental currency data snapshot generated via scripts/build-currency-data-snapshot.ps1; derived JSON normalized UTF-8/LF SHA-256 c1f3aaea54949be9a7399a105dd61917a293dafb73171b9c1d3f6cf0b9179f95; not an official ISO 4217 redistribution.

sources.notes: Generated from pinned SIX ISO 4217 List One XML and Unicode CLDR supplementalData.xml by scripts/build-currency-data-snapshot.ps1. The hash is calculated over normalized UTF-8 text with LF line endings.
Official ISO 4217 Maintenance Agency current currency and funds code list. The XML source is checked in and pinned by normalized UTF-8/LF SHA-256.
Unicode CLDR supplemental currency fraction and territory currency data. The XML source is checked in and pinned by normalized UTF-8/LF SHA-256.

upstreamReferences.name: SIX ISO 4217 currency and funds code list
upstreamReferences.usage: Authoritative source for current ISO 4217 alpha-3 code, numeric code, English name, and standard minor-unit fields.

upstreamReferences.name: Unicode CLDR supplemental currency data
upstreamReferences.usage: Source for cash fraction metadata and current territory-to-currency relationships.

redistributionNotice: This package data is a derived metadata snapshot and is not an official ISO 4217 redistribution.
